title: [codex] simplify image video config
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Removes the stale local `IMAGE_CONFIG` model catalog and keeps only model-specific default image side lengths.
- Derives allowed image models and video model detection from `shared/registry/image.ts`.
- Deletes unused min-pixel scaling helpers and local image/video metadata that duplicated the shared registry.
- Net diff against current `main`: 3 files, 30 insertions, 336 deletions.

Checks:
- `rg -n "IMAGE_CONFIG|getDefaultSideLength|IMAGE_DEFAULT_SIDE_LENGTHS|getScaledDimensions|scaleToMinPixels|minPixels|defaultDuration|defaultResolution|isVideo" gen.pollinations.ai/src gen.pollinations.ai/test shared/registry --glob "!**/node_modules/**"`
- `npx biome check --write gen.pollinations.ai/src/image/createAndReturnVideos.ts gen.pollinations.ai/src/image/models.ts gen.pollinations.ai/src/image/params.ts`
- `npm run test --workspace pollinations-gen -- test/image/seedreamModel.test.ts test/image/ideogramModel.test.ts test/image/wanVideoModel.test.ts test/image/xaiVideoModel.test.ts test/model-permissions.test.ts` (42 tests)
- `npm run typecheck --workspace pollinations-gen`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`

Note: validation used a temporary symlink to the existing local dependency tree after the worktree dependency copy proved incomplete; the symlink was removed before commit.

gist.headline: Spring Cleaning the Image Config
gist.blurb: We've swept away some dusty, duplicated image and video configurations. Everything now points neatly to our shared registry, making the codebase lighter and easier to maintain.
gist.summary: Removed the stale local IMAGE_CONFIG catalog in favor of deriving allowed image and video models directly from the shared registry.
gist.impact: This internal cleanup removes over 300 lines of duplicated configuration, simplifying future model updates.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee sweeping up old, dusty code blocks or organizing a neat, single filing cabinet (shared registry). Nomnom creature eating the old deleted code.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot sweeping up dusty, old code blocks with a tiny broom while the round tan Nomnom creature happily eats the discarded files. A neat, glowing lime green (#ecf874) filing cabinet stands nearby. Soft pastel gradient background, warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley.
